title: beads issue IDs in dispatch_payment doc comment expose internal tracker to public
description: The dispatch_payment doc comment reads 'For nie-7ri: establishes the dispatch skeleton used by ... nie-glh (payer /pay), nie-c20 (payer Address), nie-ca4 (payee Request)'. These IDs are beads internal issue numbers. On GitHub they appear as opaque references with no link, no context. Suggested rewrite: describe the intent ('This function is the dispatch skeleton; state-transition logic is added incrementally.') and remove the tracker IDs. Contributors reading the code cannot follow the references and may copy the pattern.
